title: 3L Footed Glass Trifle Bowl – Clear Dessert Serving Dish for Layered Pudding, Gateaux, Fruit & Salads – Large Pedestal Centerpiece Bowl – Dishwasher Safe | M&W
features: ✔️ MAKE AN OCCASION - Serve up mouthwatering trifles and desserts at dinner parties, family events and gatherings.
✔️ ELEGANT GLASS - Made to traditional glass-making techniques, this dish will easily suit a wide range of interior decor schemes thanks to the sleek, contemporary design.

✔️ GIFT IDEA - This trifle bowl has a striking appearance that makes it the perfect birthday, Christmas, wedding or housewarming gift. The recipient will love the size and style of this bowl when they’re creating their trifle delights!
✔️ 2-YEAR WARRANTY - Comes with a 2-year manufacturer's warranty.
description: Product Description Footed Glass Trifle Bowl | M&W If you’re making a trifle, you want to make sure it looks as good as it tastes. With the Maison & White Footed Glass Trifle Bowl, you can create a deliciously layered trifle that looks and tastes the part. It has a handmade construction in a modern design with a deep 3-litre capacity and attractive base that will make an impression upon your guests at dinner. The bowl can also be used for layered fruit salads, puddings, serving punch or for using as a way to display fruit. Whatever your use, it is sure to bring a touch of elegance to your home. SHOW-STOPPING STYLE This trifle bowl has a deep construction and a large 3-litre capacity that’s capable of serving 8 or more guests. The footed stem design of this bowl makes it ideal for serving up a trifle, gateaux, and other desserts that are sure to impress your guests. HANDCRAFTED & DISHWASHER SAFE Handmade to traditional techniques, this trifle bowl has a striking appearance and great durability. The modern design of this bowl means it’ll sit perfectly in a wide range of contemporary decors. It is dishwasher safe and suitable for everyday use. AN IDEAL GIFT The bowl is a stylish and modern piece that makes the perfect birthday or Christmas present for the bakers in your life, an elegant wedding present or a thoughtful housewarming gift. It’ll provide years of enjoyment. Specification: Size: 20cm x 20cm x 21.5cm Capacity: 3 Litre Material: Glass In the box: 1 x Glass Trifle Bowl
